title: ochna rhizomatosa
intro: Ochna rhizomatosa, also known as the Ochna bush or Ochna spinescent, is a shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa, belonging to the family Ochnaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ochna rhizomatosa include the relief of fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. Ochna rhizomatosa is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
